title: Belongs To
description: The source model has a foreign key pointing to the target model's primary key. Example: a Comment belongs to a Post — comments.post_id → posts.id.

methodName.title: Method Name
methodName.description: camelCase PHP method on the source model returning the related instance. E.g. 'post' for $comment->post().

foreignKey.title: Foreign Key
foreignKey.description: Column on the source model's table that holds the reference. E.g. 'post_id'.

ownerKey.title: Owner Key
ownerKey.description: Primary key column on the target model's table. Usually 'id'.
